prompt.content:
Make the following changes to the RMBS vs ONTO analysis in the merger model 
1.	Update RMBS Share Price at Acquisition to be its average daily share price between January 2, 2025 and December 31, 2025 (inclusive of start and end dates)
2.	Update the % cash consideration to 5%
3.	Update the % Bid Premium to 15%
4.	Update the % SG&A Synergies to 65%
5.	Update Advisory Fees to 0.25%
6.	Assuming the Proforma income statement is year 0, create a 2 year projection by assuming the following
a.	Assume revenue growth rate in year 1 is the implied growth rate between RMBS's 9M TTM 2025 revenue and 2024 revenue less 1.5 percentage points. Assume year 2 revenue growth rate is also 1.5 percentage points less than year 1 revenue growth 
b.	Decrease the current cost of revenue/revenue ratio by 2 percentage points each following year.
c.	Increase SG&A and Other operating expenses by annualized February 2025 – November 2025 CPI growth (assume constant monthly growth rate) for the 2 year forecast period
d.	Reduce Advisory & financing fees to 0 for the forecast years
e.	Keep Net interest income fixed for the 2 years following
f.	Assume a tax rate of 24%
7.	Calculate the following;
 a. percentage yoy growth in EPS in year 1 and 2
 b. Year 1 and 2 EPS accretion on pre-deal RMBS EPS

Show answers in % to 2 decimal places.

rubrics.name: States the Year 1 EPS growth is 4,636.25% (acceptable range 4,589.89% to... (ver_dd7cf415e4e14b59ae115442bfa8baf8)

messages.content: States the Year 1 EPS growth is 4,636.25% (acceptable range 4,589.89% to 4,682.61%).
